name: Kenneth Werner Quass — death and burial (1982)
researcher_question: When and where did Kenneth Werner Quass die, and where was he buried?
notes: 20th-century US death with multiple modern indexed records (Texas death index, Find a Grave). Death occurred in Texas (Grapevine, Tarrant Co.) but burial was back in Minnesota (Madelia) near family — the agent should recover both the death and the geographically separate burial. The subject is otherwise well-anchored by parents, spouse, children, and census residences, so the agent has a strong starting point to search from.
